tracks.rawText: 0:34[Rec] May 9 02:21:18UploadReggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm at 92 BPM in G minor, The track features a deep, sub-heavy kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A melodic, plucked synth riff provides a repetitive harmonic hook, Male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and light saturation, The bassline is a thick, sustained synth bass that follows the root notes of the chord progression, Occasional atmospheric pads and riser effects transition between sectionsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:55[Rec] May 9 02:20:37UploadReggaeton with a dark, urban aesthetic, The track features a heavy dembow rhythm with a punchy kick and crisp snare, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern, The melodic core consists of a minor-key, plucked synth lead with a short decay and a dark, atmospheric pad in the background, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and moderate reverb, delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style, The tempo is 90 BPM in the key of G minor, Occasional synth risers and percussive fills mark transitionsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:09Andrea Gonzálezv5.5Reggaeton with trap influences, A syncopated dembow rhythm features a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, dry snares, A dark, minor-key synth melody uses a plucked, percussive timbre with short decay, A deep sub-bass follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and a slight plate reverb, The arrangement includes occasional rhythmic stops and filtered transitions, 90 BPM, G minor, 4/4 time1PublishRemix
